---
title: "05b — Fine-Tune RoBERTa Large for Antisemitism Classification"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

## Prerequisites check

```{r check-prereqs}
# Use reconciled labels (Claude + Gemini ensemble, Claude-adjudicated)
verified_path <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "antisem_labels_all_verified.csv")
labels_path <- verified_path
if (!file.exists(verified_path)) {
  # Fallback to raw Claude labels
  labels_path <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, "antisem_labels_raw.csv")
  message("WARNING: Using raw Claude labels (reconciliation not yet run)")
}
if (!file.exists(labels_path)) {
  stop("Labels not found. Run reconciliation first: ", labels_path)
}

labels <- read.csv(labels_path)
message("Label source: ", basename(labels_path))
message("Labeled articles: ", nrow(labels))
message("Label distribution:")
print(table(labels$label, useNA = "always"))
```

## GPU verification

```{r gpu-check}
library(reticulate)
use_python(PYTHON_EXE, required = TRUE)

py_run_string("
import torch
if torch.cuda.is_available():
    print(f'CUDA available: {torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)}')
    print(f'VRAM: {torch.cuda.get_device_properties(0).total_memory / 1e9:.1f} GB')
else:
    print('WARNING: CUDA not available. Training will be on CPU (very slow).')
")
```

## Fine-tune RoBERTa Large

```{r finetune}
# Skip if model already exists
model_dir <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, "roberta_antisemitism")

if (file.exists(file.path(model_dir, "model.safetensors")) ||
    file.exists(file.path(model_dir, "pytorch_model.bin"))) {
  message("RoBERTa model already exists at ", model_dir)
  message("Delete the directory to retrain.")
} else {
  message("Starting RoBERTa Large fine-tuning...")
  message("This may take 10-30 minutes on GPU.")

  source_python(file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "R", "finetune_roberta.py"))
  results <- finetune_roberta(labels_path, model_dir, seed = as.integer(SEED))

  message("\n=== Fine-tuning complete ===")
}
```

## Model evaluation summary

```{r eval-summary}
metrics_path <- file.path(model_dir, "training_metrics.json")
if (file.exists(metrics_path)) {
  metrics <- jsonlite::fromJSON(metrics_path)

  cat("\n--- Evaluation Metrics ---\n")
  for (k in names(metrics$eval_metrics)) {
    v <- metrics$eval_metrics[[k]]
    if (is.numeric(v)) {
      cat(sprintf("  %s: %.4f\n", k, v))
    }
  }

  cat("\n--- Data Split ---\n")
  cat(sprintf("  Train: %d samples (%.1f%% positive)\n",
              metrics$train_samples,
              metrics$label_distribution$train_positive * 100))
  cat(sprintf("  Val:   %d samples (%.1f%% positive)\n",
              metrics$val_samples,
              metrics$label_distribution$val_positive * 100))

  cat("\n--- Confusion Matrix ---\n")
  cm <- metrics$confusion_matrix
  cat(sprintf("  TN=%d  FP=%d\n  FN=%d  TP=%d\n",
              cm[[1]][1], cm[[1]][2], cm[[2]][1], cm[[2]][2]))
} else {
  message("No metrics file found at ", metrics_path)
}
```
